confidence_rationale: Clear instructional video with educational overlays and text labels identifying specific gynecological procedures. This is not an FLS task but rather a training demonstration using fruit models.
technique_summary: Educational demonstration of laparoscopic techniques for gynecological procedures using low-fidelity fruit models. Shows proper instrument handling and systematic approach to tissue excision.
